title: Inverted Torches
body:
# Inverted Torches
Inverted Torches is a lightweight resource pack that overhauls the look of torches to have a unique looking glow effect on them!

**This pack will not be updated to 1.21.4 or later due to Mojang implementing their own version of this resource pack into the Vanilla game. Regardless, this resource pack should still work on versions past 1.21.1** _(12/19/24)_

![Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DRrGqrye/images/b376d0b082269cb9b1dc13a6af7f4bc160131d27.png)

## How is the effect done?
The effect is achieved by creating an inverted cube -- hence the name -- and rendering it without shading.

![Effect explained by I_Am_Merp](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/F1kglZZWAAAYJ1t?format=png)

## Credit
Idea and Concept by [I_Am_Merp](https://twitter.com/I_Am_Merp/status/1682410458651697154)
